HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

51class SIEFormPMCHW : public SIEForm {
52 protected:
53 // ---- Homogeneous medium parameters ----
54 dcmplx epsilon;
55 dcmplx mu;
56
63 dcmplx Zr(dcmplx e, dcmplx m);
64
65 // ---- Layered medium parameters ----
66 std::vector<dcmplx> epsilonLayered;
67 std::vector<dcmplx> muLayered;
68 std::vector<double> zValsInterfaces;
69 int midLayerIndex;
70 GreenF* grnFunLayered;
71
78 std::vector<dcmplx> ZrLayered(const std::vector<dcmplx>& e,
79 const std::vector<dcmplx>& m);
80
82 static int threads;
83
84 public:
85 // ---------------- Constructors ----------------
95 SIEFormPMCHW(std::vector<RWGFun> *inRWGFuns, GreenF *inGrnFun,
96 std::vector<IncidentField *> *inIncFields,
97 dcmplx inVacWavelength, dcmplx inEpsilon, dcmplx inMu);
98
111 SIEFormPMCHW(std::vector<RWGFun> *inRWGFuns,
112 GreenF *inGrnFun,
113 std::vector<IncidentField *> *inIncFields,
114 dcmplx inVacWavelength,
115 GreenF *inGrnFunLayered,
116 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilon,
117 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMu,
118 const std::vector<double>& inZVals,
119 int inMidLayerIndex = 0);
120
121 // --------------------- Matrix assembly ---------------------
127 int FillLSEMatrix(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix);
128
137 int FillLSEMatrixParallel(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix,
138 const std::vector<std::vector<RWGFun *>> &rwgPerTri,
139 int &index, std::mutex *mut);
140
147 int FillLSEMatrixAndGradient(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix,
148 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseGradientMatrix[3]);
149
160 int FillLSEMatrixAndGradientParallel(
161 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseMatrix,
162 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *lseGradientMatrix[3],
163 const std::vector<std::vector<RWGFun *>> &rwgPerTri,
164 const std::vector<int> &bordertype, int &index, std::mutex *mut);
165
166 // --------------------- Vector assembly ---------------------
172 int FillLSEVector(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *lseVector);
173
174 // ------------------------ Utilities ------------------------
180 int GetLayerIndex(rvec pos) const;
181
186 static void AssignThreads(int t);
187};
188
189#endif
GreenF.h
Abstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions.
IncidentField.h
Abstract interface for incident electromagnetic excitations.
RWGFun.h
Header for the RWGFun class.
SIEForm.h
Header for the SIEForm class.
GreenF
Abstract base for Green's function kernels.
